numbers.name: Fleet Safety
numbers.actual: Quarterly: 80.2 avg, 19.8% at-risk, 1 claim all quarter (major streak win)
numbers.note: 82% reduction in high-risk drivers. Zero insurance claims in 6+ weeks. Safety automations live (3/23). Samsara QA brief written (4/12): three-way weight mismatch discovered across attendance policy, Mike's Enhanced Scoring Protocol, and bonus calculator code — routed to Paul first, then Mike/Brian/Matisen. ~35/74 unsigned Samsara warnings (4/9). Mike completed camera audit, dismissed alerts review, trip assignment audit this week. Samsara consolidation EOQ. | 4/27 update: Cameron dropped to Green based on Driver's Ed dashboard. Final week: 4 of 10 branches Red (NA, HOU, DAL, MCK), CTXH 15.6% at-risk, DFWT 16.7%. Quarter trended down at the end. SG bar not met.

numbers.name: Hiring Budgets
numbers.actual: Brian hired 19 in 2 weeks, 7 more pending
numbers.note: Brian's region hired 19 people in 2 weeks with 7 more offers pending (3/20 huddle). Anne tracking across all regions. I-9/E-verify training completed, Clear Company templates being updated. Mike (4/1): Samsara consolidation on hold until EOQ — data integrity issue (safety data wouldn't transfer in merge).

numbers.name: Estimate Accuracy
numbers.actual: New goals: Green at 54%, Super Green at 56%
numbers.note: Roundtable (3/23) set new estimate accuracy targets: green at 54%, super green at 56%. Finalize receipts + sales block participation tracker tied to manager reports. Dashboard date selector bug workaround via URL parameters. Investigate 'other emails' affecting accuracy.

numbers.name: $ Conversions
numbers.actual: Baseline broken — not apples-to-apples post-VP rollout
numbers.note: 4/10 huddle: VP rollout pushed contact-capture earlier in funnel. Leads up 58% (1,387 vs 876), bookings flat — company-wide conversion drop is explained by denominator growth. BUT team-level conversion rates ALSO dropped ~10% (was 38%, now Leander at 6.98%, Daniel at 15%) which the denominator theory doesn't explain. Matisen flagged a possible filtering/attribution bug on top of the baseline change — Fort Worth creation-date filter not matching company-wide filter when searching by Leander. Matisen owns the investigation. Cameron: need apples-to-apples before scoring anyone on conversion (including variable pay). Pulse 11712899643 tracks.

numbers.name: Magic Moments
numbers.note: Jaci + Claims Team doing weekly Magic Moments roundups (3/23): flowers for grieving customer, cookies for referral partner, welcome basket for two widows moving in together. Culture embodied. Claims RAG tool piloting this week. Third claims team member interviews happening.

numbers.name: Claim Time to Close
numbers.actual: Stephanie avg 3.6 days, Jaci avg 2.5 days (wk 3/19)
numbers.note: CET Tracker (3/23): Stephanie weekly avg 3.6 days, Jaci 2.5 days (week of 3/19). Both well under the 5-day Super Green threshold. Trending down consistently since February. Source: CET Quarterly Tracker Google Sheet.

numbers.name: Smart Move System Rollout
numbers.actual: Phase 1 live, full day-of-week rollout training 4/9, go-live Tuesday 4/14 — VP bug red flag
numbers.note: ⚠️ VP REGRESSION (4/10): Multi-day VP features regressed in production — active price variable deleted from code. Bobby pushing fix. Tuesday 4/14 go-live at risk if not resolved. Day-of-week rollout training launched 4/9 — all BMs walked through, everyone trained by Monday. Quick Quote Reference Sheet built + deployed to GitHub Pages (Brian using). Nhel ran extended sales practice Friday AM. Amanda's delegation board poll going out. Pricing changes push Monday night → live Tuesday. 3-month auto-booking bug patched (365-day window, not root fix). Quote form Google Ads tracking broken (Matisen + Jeff).

numbers.actual: Awards page LIVE, mailers DONE all cities, billboards 4/6
numbers.note: Awards page LIVE on site (4/1). Mailers DONE all cities — QR codes + tracking URLs live. Billboards launching April 6, on target. Marketing dashboard DONE with walkthrough + FAQ. Design system proposal from Laura coming EOD/EOW. BBB listings: Elizabeth finalizing pricing. Apple Maps: team handling directly (external partner can't help). ROAS mapping still needed for Super Green.

numbers.note: Migration paused. Prosper VCFO confirmed — kickoff call completed 4/10. Joselle + Mike S severance terms confirmed (30 days + 4-day workweek + severance) but conversation NOT yet delivered — Paul taking lead, ~2 weeks out. Will be Red at EOQ — no migration this quarter.

numbers.name: Time to Close Books
numbers.note: No complaints about late numbers in recent syncs. Controller monthly rankings launching April 1. ROAS review pushed to next week — controllers verifying revenue numbers. Paul out April 15-17 (brother's surgery). Assume on track unless flagged.
